question: Develop a `Person` class with `name` (public), `address` (protected), and `phone` (private). Create a derived class `Student` that tries to access all three members. Demonstrate which members are accessible from `Student` and from a non-member function.

test_cases.expected:
--- Student Access Attempt ---
Student Name (public): Alice Smith (Accessible)
Student Address (protected): 123 Main St (Accessible)
Student Phone (private): Access attempt failed (Inaccessible)

--- Non-Member Function Access Attempt ---
Non-member Name (public): Alice Smith (Accessible)
Non-member Address (protected): Access attempt failed (Inaccessible)
Non-member Phone (private): Access attempt failed (Inaccessible)

errors: Missing semicolon after the definition of class 'Person'.
